pageContext.name: Spider-Woman
pageContext.description: Now all I gotta do is Spy-der-Woman my way inside…   Sideshow presents the Spider-Woman Fine Art Print, a sensational Marvel art print by Junggeun Yoon.  The Spider-Woman Fine Art Print shows Jessica Drew clad in her skintight red, black, and yellow costume. This spider-hero is poised upside down above New York City, her backdrop a radiant sunrise and gray buildings. Jessica's determined eyes have caught sight of her next target up ahead. One hand is raised as Spider-Woman readies her attack, preparing a venom blast for whichever criminals have wandered into her web.  Originally created as a variant cover for Spider-Woman Vol 7 #16 (2021), this comic book collectible is now available to fans in a fine art format. Each Spider-Woman Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Sideshow logo as part of the limited edition of 325 pieces. Available as an unframed, certified archival fine art print or in a custom framed presentation, this Marvel wall art makes an amazing addition to any collection.  Spin the threads of your own destiny when you bring home the Spider-Woman Fine Art Print by Junggeun Yoon today!
